reviews.comment:
La única YPF de Chepes y no pudimos cargar combustible por la demora que tenía, en 15 minutos que estuvimos no avanzó ni un solo auto, nos fuimos a la Shell.

(Translated by Google)
The only YPF in Chepes and we couldn't get fuel because of the delay; in the 15 minutes we were there not a single car moved, so we went to Shell.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4ejVyTXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Demora infernal, nadie trabaja y todo en medio de un tierral. De paso en ruta hace perder tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
A hellish delay, nobody's working, and it's all in the middle of nowhere. It's a real time-waster on the way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4ei1xdm9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
El ACA  siempre atiende muy bien y sus estaciones son un lujo  y aca en chepes  siguen igual .. un lujo ser socio

(Translated by Google)
ACA always provides excellent service and its stations are top-notch, and here in Chepes they're still the same... being a member is a real privilege.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4cEtENXVnRRAB

reviews.comment:

The station was fine. But there's no gas in the area, which complicated my trip.
